info.name: CRUD Framework Demo
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for testing the Generic CRUD Framework example application.

Demo Users:
- admin/admin — All permissions (full CRUD + relation operations)
- editor/editor — List, Get, Create, Update + relation List/Add (no Delete, no REMOVE)
- viewer/viewer — List, Get + relation List only (read-only)

Base URL: http://localhost:8080

item.name: Get Product by ID — Summary Projection
Get Product by ID — Detail Projection
Get Product by ID — Inventory Projection
Get Products — Sorted by Price DESC
Get Products — Combined Filter + Sort + Paginate
Create Product — Business Rule Violation: Discontinued + High Price (expect 400)
Create Product — Name Exceeds Max Length (expect 400)
Get Customers — Sorted by Last Name
Create Customer — Suspended Without Phone (expect 400 — business rule)
CustomerProfile — CRUD Operations (One-to-One)
item.description: Demonstrates ONE-TO-ONE relationship: each Customer has exactly one CustomerProfile linked via customer_id FK.

item.name: One-to-One: Get Profile for Customer (John Doe)
One-to-One: Get Profile for Customer (Carlos Garcia) — Summary
Get Profiles — Filter by Loyalty Tier (gold)
Create Customer Profile — Platinum with Low Orders (expect 400)
Update Customer Profile — Upgrade Loyalty Tier
Order — CRUD Operations (One-to-Many)
item.description: Demonstrates ONE-TO-MANY relationship: each Customer can have multiple Orders linked via customer_id FK.

item.name: One-to-Many: Get Orders for Customer (John Doe — 3 orders)
One-to-Many: Get Orders for Customer (Jane Smith — 2 orders)
One-to-Many: Orders for Customer + Filter by Status (delivered)
One-to-Many: Orders Sorted by Total Amount DESC + Paginated
Create Order — Cancelled with Non-Zero Amount (expect 400 — business rule)
Viewer: GET Product by ID (expect 200 — has GetProduct)
Viewer: LIST Customer Orders (expect 200 — has ListCustomerOrders filter permission)
Viewer: LIST Orders by status (expect 403 — no FilterPermission for status)

Viewer: LIST Products by category (expect 200 — has ListProductsByCategory)
Admin: LIST Products by status (expect 403 — no FilterPermission for status)

Editor: REMOVE Tag from Product (expect 403 — no RemoveTagFromProduct)
Admin: REMOVE Tag from Product (expect 200 — has RemoveTagFromProduct)
